metrics.title: Service Excellence
metrics.insight: SLA achievement consistently above 98.5% for 8 consecutive quarters.

metrics.title: Global Delivery Excellence

performanceExcellence.title: Performance Excellence
performanceExcellence.narrative: TCS partnership demonstrates strong ROI of 170% with consistent SLA achievement at 98.7%. Total investment of €250M has generated €420M in business value. Global delivery footprint expanded to 12 centers with 94.2% on-time delivery.

expansionOpportunity.title: Expansion Opportunity
expansionOpportunity.narrative: Joint AI/ML initiatives show 340% ROI potential. SOC automation could reduce incident response time by 60%. Contract renegotiation in Q2 2025 could unlock €50M in additional value through volume discounts and outcome-based pricing.
